parts.text: For client_id playground, call process_document_batch with paths=["tests/fixtures/stub-invoice.pdf"]. Return only status, llm_call_count, documents_processed, and export_rows length.

For client_id playground, call process_document_batch with paths=["tests/fixtures/stub-invoice.pdf", "tests/fixtures/bank_multi_ccy_digital.pdf"]. Return status, llm_call_count, documents_processed, and erp_exports sheet names.
